title: Damage Type
description: A type of damage in D&D 5e (v2.0.0)

id.description: Unique identifier with damage: prefix (e.g., 'damage:fire'). Note: the namespace is 'damage:' not 'damage_type:' to match cross-references in monsters/spells/poisons.

description.description: Array of description paragraphs from SRD

page.description: SRD page number where this damage type is described

aliases.description: Alternative names for this damage type

examples.description: Example sources of this damage type (e.g., 'red dragon breath', 'fireball spell')
